# @platform/platform-observability

OpenTelemetry API wrapper for trace span creation, metrics recording, and active context access. Uses @opentelemetry/api only — SDK wiring stays in adapters-opentelemetry.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/platform-observability
Version: 0.1.0
Component: platform-observability
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: observability-core
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: experimental
Role: platform
Class: experimental.platform
Catalog lifecycle: experimental
Visibility: internal
Support level: experimental
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Wrap @opentelemetry/api for createTracer, startSpan, recordMetric, getActiveContext
- Provide span helpers for BFF request spans, use-case child spans, and adapter I/O spans
- Define metric recording helpers using OTel semantic conventions
- Export vendor-neutral observability abstractions consumable by use-case and adapter packages

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not import @opentelemetry/sdk-* (SDK is wired by adapters-opentelemetry at startup)
- Does not configure OTLP exporters
- Does not import Sentry or logging packages

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Import from @platform/platform-observability — public exports only
